body: We need to fix, so everything always fit, everything formatted and spaced properly so it is nice and easy to look at. We should write formalization as `найди в интернете яблоко` -> `(Q... P... Q...)`, showing how natural language message was converted to actual Q/P ids from wikidata, if some item only found in wikipedia or wiktionary, we should use virtual ids prefixes as WP and WT. `(Q... P... Q...)` should match most common Subject Verb Object grammar, no matter the source language. So working with all terms after formalization is much easier for the code. Double check that we always formalize all messages correctly during reasoning, and that the way formalization was actually executed on real data from wikidata/wikipedia/wiktionary and so on. Also for all tools we need to show input and output at least, if tool itself provide reasoning steps, we should also list them. So everything is easy to understand and debug when diagnostics mode is turned on. Also we should use not `search` emoji, but something like labs related or may be other emoji that is more about diagnostics. We also should have button to show source code as https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai on top menu. Also if some buttons do not fit on top, we should move them to menu section to the left (that should be also collapsable at both mobile and desktop view). Bug reporting, diagnostics, demo mode should be last to be removed from top menu. `Bug reporting` is the last. Export/import if not fit we move both buttons to left menu. So we have priority list, on what should stay at top menu, and what should go to left side bar or menu buttons. Also if chat is already empty the `new conversation` button should be disabled by default. We need to fix DuckDuckGo search by adding integration testing that will actually use its API to know exactly how it works, now it does not work for some reason. Also when using multiple datasources we should deduplicate them. For example in: ``` [Яблоко (партия)](https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%AF%D0%B1%D0%BB%D0%BE%D0%BA%D0%BE_(%D0%BF%D0%B0%D1%80%D1%82%D0%B8%D1%8F)) — via wikipedia#2 - общественное объединение «ЯБЛОКО», а 15 марта 1998 года как общероссийская политическая общественная организация «Объединение ЯБЛОКО». 26 апреля 2002 года [Yabloko](http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15332) — via wikidata#2 - Russian political party ``` These are two the same things. So instead it should look like this: ``` - [Яблоко (партия)](https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%AF%D0%B1%D0%BB%D0%BE%D0%BA%D0%BE_(%D0%BF%D0%B0%D1%80%D1%82%D0%B8%D1%8F)) — общественное объединение «ЯБЛОКО», а 15 марта 1998 года как общероссийская политическая общественная организация «Объединение ЯБЛОКО». 26 апреля 2002 года. Источник — Википедия. Другие источники: [Викидата](http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15332) ``` We also should formalize the search items to translate to preferred user language. We should use similar templete for all search items. Also double check how to make work search in general on DuckDuckGo and https://web.archive.org using their API, as I understand they work in browser. ``` Providers (default first): duckduckgo, wikipedia, wikidata. ``` That line can be removed, it does not add value for the user, all sources are present anyway. Please make everything with highest possible quality, unit, integration, e2e tested, we should guarantee maximum possible quality of the UI and intelligence (logic), and data. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Better search support and diagnostics UI/UX improvements
